★ Episode 2 · The Actor Arrives ★
Mr. Ledger O'Nobreak
Senior Accountant · Perpetually Drowning in Work
📬 147 unread emails 📚 Audit stacks sky-high 🤖 Tried I.M. Helpful-ish 😤 Still did all the work himself
"Can a Smart Agent truly free him — or just give him a prettier to-do list?"
Slide 1 His AI made a beautiful plan. Ledger still had to do every. single. thing. Classic.
📬

The plan was perfect. The executor? Also Ledger.
Slide 2 "I don't need another list." He needed someone to actually DO the list.
3:00 PM · Deadline Day
Miss AI-sha.
Coffee in hand. Zero stress.
"Quarterly audit? Submitted. Invoice? Processed.
Now… another coffee, or actual strategy?"
☕
3PM
Deadline Day
⚠ Reports Due
Completely. Unbothered. 😎
Slide 4 Ledger corners her. "HOW are you on your third coffee while I'm on my fifth crisis?"
